name: team-demo-prep
title: Prepare demo folder and script for team demo of tmux and furrow workflows
description: Prepare demo folder and script for team demo of tmux and furrow workflows

gates.evidence: Definition validated. Objective: 10-min team demo of tmux+furrow. Two deliverables: DEMO.md script and pre-staged outputs. Real state from 28 rows, no fake data. Fresh-eyes review incorporated.

Research complete. tmux keybindings mapped, best row (quality-and-rules) and todo (parallel-agent-orchestration-adoption) identified, roadmap ready, furrow:next pre-staging strategy confirmed. All ideation questions resolved.
Plan complete. Two deliverables sequential, no plan.json needed. DEMO.md narrative arc structure, pre-stage only furrow:next output. No open questions.
Plan complete with plan.json. Two waves: wave 1 demo-script (DEMO.md), wave 2 pre-staged-outputs (.furrow/demo/). Sequential execution, single specialist.
Specs complete. demo-script: 5 ACs with test scenarios. pre-staged-outputs: 3 ACs with verification commands. No open questions.
Decompose complete. plan.json: 2 waves sequential. team-plan.md: single agent, no parallel dispatch. Wave 1: DEMO.md, Wave 2: pre-staged outputs.
Implementation complete. 2/2 deliverables done. DEMO.md created with full outline. Pre-staged outputs captured. All ACs verified.
Implementation complete. 2/2 deliverables. Committed as d594160.
